name: superpowers-v
description: Compound V for Superpowers: triple parallel pre-flight (code archaeology + domain-expert advisor + library/doc validator via Context7), disjoint file partitioning, manifest-driven multi-backend dispatch (Claude + headless Codex + Antigravity workers), git-diff scope enforcement, crash-resumable runs, adaptive tier-based routing, epic mode for multi-feature builds, and batched parallel dispatch (Opus default, Sonnet for narrow junior-task carve-out). Auto-intercepts brainstorming → writing-plans → execution transitions.
